message:
feat(core): add self_stabilize.rs — convergent reconciliation protocol (ft-283h4.13.1)

Self-stabilizing state reconciliation using Merkle trees (Dijkstra 1974):
- ReconcileSession: phased protocol (Init → Narrowing → Patching → Converged)
- reconcile_trees(): full reconciliation with authority-wins semantics
- StateFingerprint: lightweight 64-byte divergence detection
- ReconcileStats: change tracking with serde support
- Bounded convergence: at most 1 round for any state divergence
- Built on merkle_tree.rs for O(log N) hash-based state comparison

18 unit tests + 24 proptest properties (42 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
